Katsushika Hokui

The Ghosts of the Heike Appear in Daimotsu Bay in Settsu Province (Sesshu Daimotsu no ura Heike onryo arawaruru zu)
by Katsushika Hokui
Japan · Japanese (culture or style) · 1847–1852 · Color woodblock print
